question: Where are the players standing in relation to each other in the image? Select from the following options: (A) All are on one side of the field. (B) They are clustered around the center circle. (C) There is only one player on the field. (D) They are evenly distributed across the field.
gold_answer: They are evenly distributed across the field
answer_choices: All are on one side of the field
They are clustered around the center circle
There is only one player on the field
They are evenly distributed across the field
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
